text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
All right, time for some stretches! Pair off,
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Classmates
text_block_list.text: Hey, be my partner! Come on!

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
Um... Hey, Taishin! Have you found a partner yet?
If not, how about we stretch together?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Great. I hate it when we have to do things
in pairs.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I can fake being all friendly. I bet
she feels like she got the short end of the stick.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin barely tries during training that
day.
